commands.review_summary:
The PR captures one `installedAt` value for `clawhub install` and both update write paths so `origin.json` and the lockfile receive the same timestamp.

Reproducibility: yes. The current main source has separate `Date.now()` calls on the install path and conflicting origin-versus-lockfile timestamp writes on update; I did not execute the CLI because this was a read-only review.
